prompt: Bauhaus 1923 poster, minimalist. A 'Neural Network' as a flat 2D geometric grid. Three vertical layers of primary-colored circles (Red, Blue, Yellow). Intersecting thin, sharp black diagonal lines. Background is aged off-white paper. Balanced asymmetry. NO 3D shading, NO gradients, NO digital glows. Only primary colors and black. Authentic lithograph texture.
tradition_approach: Targeted primary colors (RYB), geometric primitives, and flat 2D compositions. Mapped neural layers to a vertical geometric grid, strictly following the 'form follows function' rule while avoiding modern digital gradients.
